name: S-6 detector fails validation when a rule's provenance array is empty per the architecture (>=1 entry required)
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, severity: P1, provenance: []}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rubric-provenance.sh" --tree tree 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'provenance is empty' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
